title: Monteverdia jefeana
taxonomy: Monteverdia jefeana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a member of the genus Monteverdia, which is a group of plants primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Monteverdia jefeana is native to Panama and is known to thrive in humid environments. The plant is often found growing in areas with high altitudes and dense vegetation. As a species within the Celastraceae family, Monteverdia jefeana is closely related to other plants such as the staff vine and the wax tree.
